candidates.row_label: Straight-line amortization of the multi-client library
candidates.why: Separate amortization line item shown directly after Cost of sales in the operating section, suggesting COGS-related D&A presented outside the selected Cost of sales row and therefore should be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Accelerated amortization of the multi-client library
candidates.why: Separate amortization line item adjacent to Cost of sales in the operating section, indicating additional COGS-related D&A outside the selected Cost of sales row.
Potential amortization line, but wording is broader and not clearly tied to COGS versus overhead; less suitable than the explicit multi-client library amortization rows.
This appears to be a broader operating-overhead D&A summary located with personnel costs and other operating expenses, so it fits SG&A/overhead rather than COGS.

variables.notes: Manually Removed. Selected the explicit multi-client library amortization rows as separate operating lines adjacent to Cost of sales. The empty summary row 'Amortization and impairment of multi-client library' cannot be used. Impairment rows were excluded.

candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A summary row presented separately from the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS rows Personnel costs and Other operating expenses, so it should be added separately. It is preferred over its underlying components to avoid double counting.
Looks like a component of the broader Depreciation and amortization summary row, so should not be selected when the summary row is available.
Appears to be a component beneath the Depreciation and amortization summary row; excluded to avoid double counting.
Appears to be a residual component within the broader D&A summary; excluded because the summary row is available.

variables.notes: Manually Added.The earlier XSGA mapping selected Personnel costs and Other operating expenses and explicitly excluded depreciation/amortization. The separate summary row 'Depreciation and amortization' should therefore be added later. No R&D-specific adjustment is needed because XRD is empty and no dedicated R&D row appears in the excerpt.
